subtitle: Kev Soj Ntsuam Tus Cwj Pwm & Kev Txhawb Nqa
loading_hint: Module tab tom ntej los ntawm CDN. Yog hais tias qhov no nyob ntev, txheeb xyuas koj qhov kev sib txuas.
hub.select_student_first: Xaiv ib tug tub ntxhais kawm saum toj no kom pib tau
hub.abc_desc: Sau tseg qhov ua ntej (antecedent), tus cwj pwm, thiab qhov tshwm sim tom qab (consequence)
hub.obs_desc: Sau tseg sij hawm (interval), zaus (frequency), lossis ntev npaum li cas (duration) ncaj qha
hub.analysis_desc: Kev tshuaj xyuas tus cwj pwm thiab kev pom zoo siv AI
hub.overview_desc: Tus cwj pwm txoj kev hloov, daim duab kos, thiab cov ntsiab lus ntawm cov ntaub ntawv
hub.freq_desc: Suav nrawm thiab taug qab tus nqi-rau-ib feeb
hub.interval_desc: Daim phiaj sij hawm ib nrab, tag nrho, lossis ib pliag xwb
hub.token_desc: Daim phiaj kev txhawb nqa pom tau nrog cov token hloov tau
hub.hotspot_desc: Txheeb xyuas cov sij hawm tus cwj pwm tshwm sim ntau hauv cov kev ua ub ua no niaj hnub
hub.record_desc: Muab IEP/cov ntaub ntawv tshuaj xyuas tso rau kev sau ntsiab lus siv AI
hub.contract_desc: Daim ntawv cog lus tus cwj pwm ntawm tub ntxhais kawm-xib fwb sau los ntawm AI
hub.cycle_desc: Lub voj voog kev tawg tsa 7 theem nrog cov tswv yim cuam tshuam
hub.reinforcer_desc: Txheeb xyuas cov reinforcer ua tau zoo hauv 5 pawg
hub.audit_desc: Daim ntawv txheeb xyuas chav kawm 8-nqe nrog AI kev pom zoo
hub.triangulation_desc: Sib piv 3+ cov chaw muab cov ntaub ntawv kom pom kev sib haum
hub.impact_desc: Suav tus cwj pwm zaus, ntev npaum li cas, thiab tus nqi ib xyoos
hub.traffic_desc: Daim ntawv tshaj tawm liab/daj/ntsuab rau tub ntxhais kawm pom
hub.datasheet_desc: Cov ntawv ntsuam xyuas luam tau rau zaus, ntev npaum li cas, ABC, lossis latency
hub.homenote_desc: Kev sib txuas lus rau niam txiv sau los ntawm AI nrog kev xaiv suab
hub.fidelity_desc: Daim ntawv txheeb xyuas BIP niaj hnub tsim los ntawm AI
hub.feasibility_desc: Kev ntsuam xyuas 5-lus nug haum rau cov chaw nrog AI kev pom zoo
hub.gas_desc: GAS (Goal Attainment Scaling) nrog cov lus piav tsim los ntawm AI
hub.pocket_desc: Daim ntawv sau ntsiab BIP me me rau nqa hauv clipboard
hub.abagraph_desc: Cov duab kos tshaj tawm tau nrog cov kab phase, kab kev hloov, thiab kev tshuaj xyuas pom
hub.abaguide_desc: Phau ntawv txhais lus nrhiav tau, cov sij hawm reinforcement, ntoo kev txiav txim siab & cov yuam kev nquag pom
hub.abaquiz_desc: Sim koj txoj kev paub ABA — tau ib lub cim txawj ntse thaum tau 80%+
hub.antecedentmod_desc: Kev pom zoo hloov chaw nyob siv AI kom tiv thaiv cov cwj pwm ua ntej lawv pib
hub.bcbahandoff_desc: Dashboard cov ntaub ntawv rau BCBA + pob ntawv handoff luam tau rau kev sab laj
hub.biascheck_desc: Maj mam tshawb pom cov qauv hauv koj cov ntaub ntawv kom xav txog kev tawm tsam pom tsis tau (implicit bias) — kev loj hlob, tsis yog kev txhaum
hub.caseload_desc: Saib tag nrho cov tub ntxhais kawm — cov cim qhia xwm txheej, kev hloov, ceeb toom kev nyab xeeb, thiab AI sau caseload
hub.casestudy_desc: Cov case study tsim los ntawm AI nrog 4-theem kev xav clinical thiab kev qhab nia
hub.commlog_desc: Taug qab kev sib cuag ob-txoj kev nrog tsev neeg nrog kev rov mus xyuas — kom tsis muaj tsev neeg poob
hub.condprob_desc: Kev tshuaj xyuas foreground vs background probability kom paub tseeb tias ABC hypothesis raug nrog cov ntaub ntawv
hub.consent_desc: Daim ntawv tso cai hloov tau rau niam txiv pauv cov ntaub ntawv — kho, luam, qhia ua JSON
hub.counseling_desc: AI role-play nrog cov tub ntxhais kawm persona rau kev xyaum sab laj
hub.cultural_desc: Daim ntawv txheeb 8-lus nug nres-thiab-xav ua ntej koj txhais tus cwj pwm los ntawm kev txo hwj chim kab lis kev cai
hub.cultural_title: Kev Xav Txog Cov Ntsiab Lus Kab Lis Kev Cai
hub.cumrecord_desc: Daim duab kos cumulative frequency Skinner-style classic — cov keeb kwm ntawm ABA cov ntaub ntawv pom
hub.deescalate_desc: Kev ua pa, lub moos pom, kev so sensory, thiab kev tswj — kev txhawb nqa kom kaj siab ncaj qha
hub.drstrategy_desc: Xaiv tus tswv yim differential reinforcement raug (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
hub.dtt_desc: DTT (Discrete Trial Training) — sau tseg ib qho trial-ib zaug nrog mastery criteria thiab auto-advance
hub.effectsize_desc: Suav Tau-U, NAP, thiab PND kom suav qhov kev cuam tshuam ua tau zoo nrog kev sib piv phase pom
hub.familyvoice_desc: Daim ntawv tsim rau tsev neeg los qhia kev soj ntsuam, kev paub kab lis kev cai, thiab kev zoo siab — nrog AI txhais lus
hub.fbaworkflow_desc: Cov kev coj qhia ib kauj ruam zuj zus rau FBA, BIP, thiab RTI tus cwj pwm theem nrog AI kev qhia
hub.fcttemplate_desc: FCT (Functional Communication Training) npaj nrog kev xaiv modality
hub.gamify_desc: Tus mood tracker rau tub ntxhais kawm pom nrog streaks, cim, quests, thiab phau ntawv xav
hub.glossary_desc: 25+ lo lus ABA nrhiav tau nrog cov lus txhais yooj yim thiab cov piv txwv tiag tiag
hub.homelog_desc: Kev sau tseg tus cwj pwm yooj yim rau niam txiv siv cov lus niaj hnub
hub.iepgoals_desc: Cov present levels, lub hom phiaj SMART, lub hom phiaj me, kev pab, thiab cov phiaj xwm taug qab kev nce qib tsim los ntawm AI
hub.intervention_desc: Cov phiaj xwm cuam tshuam ntau lub lim tiam tsim los ntawm AI nrog cov hom phiaj ntsuas tau thiab cov milestone
hub.ioacalc_desc: IOA (Inter-Observer Agreement) nrog 6 txoj kev — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.latency_desc: Kev ntsuas sij hawm stimulus-mus-rau-kev teb nrog cov ntsiab lus mean, median, thiab range
hub.maintenance_desc: Taug qab kev khaws cia txuj ci tom qab mastery thiab kev siv tau (generalization) hla cov chaw, tib neeg, thiab cov khoom
hub.mtss_desc: Daim duab pyramid 3-theem pom kom tswj MTSS nrog AI kev pom zoo tso theem
hub.nlabc_desc: Sau lossis muab cov ntawv soj ntsuam ua lus Askiv niaj hnub — AI tsim lawv ua ABC entries cia li
hub.obscoach_desc: Kev qhia ncaj qha rau koj txoj kev sau cov ntaub ntawv — txheeb xyuas qhov tu, qhia kev txhim kho, thiab qhab nia koj cov ntaub ntawv
hub.pdpath_desc: Cov module onboarding coj qhia kom tsim cov txuj ci ABA ib kauj ruam zuj zus
hub.predict_desc: Kev tshuaj xyuas qauv siv AI kwv yees thaum twg, qhov twg, thiab dab tsi ua rau cov cwj pwm — nrog cov tswv yim tiv thaiv
hub.prefassess_desc: Kev txheeb xyuas reinforcer sib npaug — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, thiab Free Operant protocol
hub.progress_desc: Cov nqe lus taug qab kev nce qib npaj txhij rau IEP los ntawm cov ntaub ntawv tus cwj pwm sau cia
hub.qualitycheck_desc: Kev tshuaj xyuas koj cov ABC entries siv AI nrog cov lus pom zoo txhim kho tshwj xeeb
hub.quick_launch_hint: Cov cuab yeej clinical tseem ceeb — ib qho kov tau
hub.recent_sessions: Cov Session Soj Ntsuam Tsis Ntev Los No
hub.reframe_desc: AI sau dua cov lus piav qhia ntsig txog kev tsis txaus mus rau cov lus ntsig txog tus yam ntxwv zoo thiab lub zog
hub.reinforcement_desc: Daim ntawv tshuaj xyuas kev txhawb siab — txheeb xyuas dab tsi tsav txhua tus tub ntxhais kawm hauv 6 pawg
hub.relmap_desc: Daim duab pom kev sib txuas ntawm tub ntxhais kawm — cov neeg laus ntseeg tau, phooj ywg, tsev neeg, mentor — nrog kev tshuaj xyuas qhov tu
hub.replacebehavior_desc: Tham cov cwj pwm txhawj xeeb mus rau cov hloov chaw ua tau tib lub luag hauj lwm nrog cov tswv yim qhia
hub.replacebehavior_title: Tus Npaj Tus Cwj Pwm Hloov Chaw
hub.restorative_desc: Cov ntawv coj qhia ib kauj ruam zuj zus rau kev kho kev raug mob, lub voj voog zej zog, thiab rov koom rau chav kawm
hub.sandbox_desc: Thauj cov ntaub ntawv tub ntxhais kawm xa kim rau PD, kev cob qhia ua ntej-pab, lossis kawm ABA tsis muaj cov tub ntxhais kawm tiag
hub.scatterplot_desc: Daim phiaj sij hawm-ntawm-hnub × tus cwj pwm los txheeb xyuas cov qauv sij hawm — sau cia li los ntawm ABC cov ntaub ntawv
hub.scdmanager_desc: AB, ABAB, Multiple Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion
hub.selfcheck_desc: Tub ntxhais kawm pom mood check-in thiab phau ntawv xav — ntes tau lawv lub suab
hub.sessionnotes_desc: Cov ntawv soj ntsuam muaj sij hawm cim nrog kev hais suab — ntes cov ntsiab lus thaum nws tshwm sim
hub.sessiontracker_desc: Kev ntsuas tus cwj pwm sib npaug raws session nrog kev suav tus nqi
hub.snapshot_title: Kev Pauv Snapshot ntawm Tub Ntxhais Kawm
hub.socialvalidity_desc: TARF thiab IRP-15 scales rau kev ntsuas kev txais tos kev kho mob — yuav tsum tau muaj rau kev tshaj tawm
hub.taskanalysis_desc: Cais cov txuj ci ua cov kauj ruam qhia tau nrog forward, backward, lossis total-task chaining thiab kev taug qab cov lus qhia (prompt)
hub.teamnotes_desc: Pawg sib tham muaj sij hawm cim ntau lub luag hauj lwm rau cov xib fwb, paraprofessional, counselor, thiab niam txiv
hub.treatintegrity_desc: Sau tseg seb cov kev cuam tshuam puas raug ua raws li npaj — taug qab fidelity (kev ua raws) theem-component
hub.trends_desc: Daim duab SVG qhia kev hloov ntawm qhov hnyav, zaus chaw, thiab hnub/sij hawm heatmap
hub.cantdowontdo_desc: Cais cov txuj ci vs. kev ua tsis tau (performance deficits) kom xaiv tau qhov kev txhawb nqa raug.
hub.competingpathways_desc: Tham txog cov cwj pwm xav tau thiab cov hloov chaw tawm tsam txoj kev teeb meem.
hub.functionquiz_desc: Xyaum txheeb xyuas tus cwj pwm txoj hauj lwm los ntawm cov xwm txheej luv luv.
hub.mipractice_desc: Xyaum cov kev sib tham MI nrog cov lus teb tub ntxhais kawm xa kim.
hub.practicum_desc: Khiav ib rooj plaub xyaum coj qhia los ntawm pib mus rau kawg.
abc.analysis_failed: Kev tshuaj xyuas tsis tiav — sim dua
abc.setting_placeholder: piv txwv li, Chav Kawm, Hauv Kev, Chav Noj Mov
overview.empty_desc: Pib sau ABC cov ntaub ntawv lossis khiav kev soj ntsuam ncaj qha kom pom kev hloov ntawm no.
hotspot.tap_hint: Kov ib lub cell kom ntxiv. Nyem lub npe niaj hnub kom kho.
record.desc: Muab cov hom phiaj IEP, cov ntawv tshuaj xyuas, lossis cov ntawv taug qab kev nce qib tso rau kev tshuaj xyuas siv AI.
no_entries_match: Tsis muaj entry haum koj cov filter
quick_fill_label: 🧠 Sau-Nrawm — Piav qhia dab tsi tshwm sim
quick_fill_hint: AI yuav txhais koj qhov kev piav qhia rau cov teb hauv qab. Tom qab ntawd koj tuaj yeem kho tes.
generating_questions: ⏳ Tab tom tsim cov lus nug raws li cov ntsiab lus...
quiz_fba_purpose: Dab tsi yog lub hom phiaj tseem ceeb ntawm FBA?
search_placeholder: Tshawb antecedent, tus cwj pwm, qhov tshwm sim tom qab, cov ntawv sau, chaw nyob...
